name: Inside the Crooked Hut
description: The hut's interior is cramped and dim. A table sits at the center, covered in scraps of parchment. A crude mechanism is mounted into the far wall.{{book_desc}}{{device_desc}}
ambient: Dust drifts lazily in the still air.
The wood creaks softly, though nothing moves.
You feel as though this place is being remembered rather than inhabited.

description_snippets.book_desc: A strange book lies open on the table.
description_snippets.device_desc: A metal mechanism is set into the wall.

objects.name: book
objects.description: A weathered book filled with cramped, obsessive handwriting.

on_interact.look: The pages are filled with notes about the forest. Many passages are scratched out.
on_interact.read:
You read:

"The wood does not turn you — you turn yourself.

Listen:

Where the air stills — you are wrong.
Where the insects fall silent — you are wrong.
Where the trees creak without wind — you are wrong.

But where something changes — truly changes — there the path bends.

I walked in circles until I learned to hear the lie."

Several lines are underlined repeatedly.

objects.name: mechanism
objects.description: A strange metal device with a recessed slot and a lever. It hums faintly.

on_interact.look: The mechanism seems connected to something deep underground.
on_interact.pull: You pull the lever. Far below, something shifts — a wet, grinding sound.
on_interact.use: You try to operate the mechanism. It resists, then gives slightly.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
